about.title: About Me
about.p1: After a career as a <0>luxury retail manager</0> and an enriching experience in <1>tourism</1>, I chose to pursue a new challenge by joining <2>Wild Code School</2> for an intensive 5-month bootcamp.
about.p2: This <0>hybrid background</0> is my greatest strength: from my years in luxury, I've kept a keen eye for detail, a drive for excellence, and a deep understanding of client expectations. My management and tourism experience has equipped me with essential soft skills — <1>agility, stress management, and complex problem solving</1> — which I now apply to web development.
about.p3: Today, I combine this <0>operational rigor</0> with my developer skills to build digital solutions that are not just functional, but designed for user experience and business performance.
